message:
feat(demo_showcase): add wizard error states with recovery flows

Implement bd-2fty: Wizard error states + recovery paths

Add SimulatedError enum with three realistic backend failure types:
- PermissionDenied: Production deployments without approval
- NetworkTimeout: Transient failures (retryable)
- Conflict: Service name collision

Each error type provides:
- User-friendly error message
- is_retryable() check for UI flow control
- recovery_hint() with actionable next steps

Also updates module documentation with error state overview and
syncs beads status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
